/* Wrapper callback function for ITTI timer system
 * -----------------------------------------------
 * This function is called by the ITTI timer system when a timer expires.
 * It extracts the original NAS callback and arguments from the wrapper
 * structure and calls the original callback.
 */
static void *_nas_timer_itti_callback(void *arg)
{
  nas_timer_wrapper_t *wrapper = (nas_timer_wrapper_t *)arg;
  nas_timer_callback_t cb;
  void *args;
  void *result = NULL;
  
  if (wrapper != NULL) {
    cb = wrapper->cb;
    args = wrapper->args;
    
    /* Call the original NAS timer callback */
    if (cb != NULL) {
      result = cb(args);
    }
    
    /* Free the wrapper structure */
    free(wrapper);
  }
  
  return result;
}
